name: tiny-todo-list
description: A simple TODO list with grouping, keyboard navigation, and webview UI
author: bbjyzzwwy

tinyTodoList.autoSync.markdownDescription: Sync automatically without pressing the button. When on: **changes you make are pushed out** shortly after you finish editing (event-driven — only when something actually changed, so it stays light on Settings Sync), and **changes from other devices are pulled in** whenever this VS Code window regains focus. Turn it off to sync only via the manual sync (🔄) button, which does a full push + pull.

tinyTodoList.periodicPullSeconds.markdownDescription: Also pull changes from other devices on a fixed interval (in seconds), in addition to the focus-triggered pull. Handy if you keep this window focused for long stretches and want it to refresh on its own. `0` disables it — receiving then relies on the focus-triggered pull, VS Code's background Settings Sync, and the manual sync (🔄) button. When enabled, values below 30 are clamped to 30 seconds to avoid rate-limiting.
